files.patch:
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ jobs:
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
-        node: [22, 24]
+        node: [24]
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
@@ -27,7 +27,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Enable Corepack
         run: |
           corepack enable
-          corepack prepare pnpm@10.25.0 --activate
+          corepack prepare pnpm@10.33.2 --activate
 
       - name: Install
         run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
@@ -78,12 +78,12 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Node
         uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
-          node-version: 22
+          node-version: 24
 
       - name: Enable Corepack
         run: |
           corepack enable
-          corepack prepare pnpm@10.25.0 --activate
+          corepack prepare pnpm@10.33.2 --activate
 
       - name: Install
         run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

@@ -91,7 +91,7 @@ More:
 
 ### Install
 
-Requires Node 22+.
+Requires Node 24+.
 
 - npx (no install):

@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ Lightweight, CLI-only SQLite cache. Single DB file.
 - Avoid repeated transcripts/extractions/summaries.
 - No file sprawl; bounded disk usage.
 - Safe defaults; easy opt-out.
-- Native SQLite only (Node 22 + Bun).
+- Native SQLite only (Node 24 + Bun).
 
 ## Storage

@@ -36,7 +36,7 @@
     "build:bun": "bun scripts/build-bun.js",
     "build:bun:test": "bun scripts/build-bun.js --test",
     "build:cli": "node scripts/build-cli.mjs",
-    "build:lib": "tsc -p tsconfig.build.json",
+    "build:lib": "tsgo -p tsconfig.build.json",
     "check": "pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm test:coverage",
     "clean": "rimraf dist packages/core/dist",
     "dev:cli": "pnpm -C packages/core build && tsx src/cli.ts",
@@ -53,7 +53,7 @@
     "test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage",
     "test:coverage:build": "pnpm build && pnpm test:coverage",
     "test:extension-e2e": "pnpm -C apps/chrome-extension test:e2e",
-    "typecheck": "tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --noEmit"
+    "typecheck": "tsgo -p tsconfig.build.json --noEmit"
   },
   "dependencies": {
     "@mariozechner/pi-ai": "^0.70.2",
@@ -74,20 +74,21 @@
     "@types/jsdom": "^28.0.1",
     "@types/node": "^25.6.0",
     "@types/sanitize-html": "^2.16.1",
+    "@typescript/native-preview": "7.0.0-dev.20260427.1",
     "@vitest/coverage-v8": "^4.1.5",
     "esbuild": "^0.28.0",
     "oxfmt": "0.46.0",
-    "oxlint": "^1.61.0",
+    "oxlint": "^1.62.0",
     "oxlint-tsgolint": "^0.22.0",
     "rimraf": "^6.1.3",
     "tsx": "^4.21.0",
     "typescript": "^6.0.3",
     "vitest": "^4.1.5"
   },
   "engines": {
-    "node": ">=22"
+    "node": ">=24"
   },
-  "packageManager": "pnpm@10.25.0+sha512.5e82639027af37cf832061bcc6d639c219634488e0f2baebe785028a793de7b525ffcd3f7ff574f5e9860654e098fe852ba8ac5dd5cefe1767d23a020a92f501",
+  "packageManager": "pnpm@10.33.2",
   "pnpm": {
     "overrides": {
       "uuid": "14.0.0",

@@ -66,6 +66,9 @@ importers:
       '@types/sanitize-html':
         specifier: ^2.16.1
         version: 2.16.1
+      '@typescript/native-preview':

         version: 0.22.0

       vitest:
         specifier: ^4.1.5
-        version: 4.1.5(@opentelemetry/api@1.9.0)(@types/node@25.6.0)(@vitest/coverage-v8@4.1.5)(jsdom@29.0.2)(vite@8.0.10(@types/node@25.6.0)(esbuild@0.28.0)(jiti@2.6.1)(tsx@4.21.0))
